case_title: DARROW BOGGIANO VS. NABIL ALMATARI et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-23-2013 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,794.40 FILED BY BOGGIANO, DARROW AS TO DEFENDANT ALMATARI, NABIL FUAD, ALSHARABI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $20.00) SERVED OCT-08-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FUAD, ALSHARABI

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGGIANO, DARROW ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-03-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $20.00) SERVED OCT-08-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALMATARI, NABIL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-23-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT NABIL ALMATARI WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ZADIK SHAPIRO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
